summary: Verified Coach Watch 10-state relationship matrix implementation. All 4 test programs (Stanford, Florida, Creighton, UCLA) return correct states from backend API. Frontend CoachWatchCard component correctly displays all required fields. SI drawer opens correctly. All tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: _compute_coach_watch() correctly implements 10-state matrix: no_signals, waiting, follow_up_window, emerging, active_conversation, hot_opportunity, cooling, re_engaged, stalled, deprioritize
State priority order enforced: hot > active > re_engaged > emerging > cooling > stalled > follow_up > waiting > deprioritize > no_signals
Each state has consistent interestLevel, trend, summary, recommendedAction, primaryCta, secondaryCta
Weighted scoring uses 4 buckets with time decay (100%→80%→55%→30%→10%)
CoachWatchCard correctly displays all required fields via data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Used existing programs from seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Watch 10-state matrix fully tested. Backend endpoint: GET /api/coach-watch/{program_id}. Key data-testid selectors: coach-watch-card, cw-interest-level, cw-trend, cw-summary, cw-action, cw-signal-{n}, cw-score. Journey page route is /pipeline/:programId. All 4 programs verified: Stanford=hot_opportunity, Florida=deprioritize, Creighton=no_signals, UCLA=active_conversation.

verified_requirements.Stanford (reply + campus visit) → hot_op: ✅ PASS - state=hot_opportunity, interestLevel=Medium, trend=Increasing, signals=[visit_invite, coach_reply]
verified_requirements.Florida (no reply, old outreach > 14d) →: ✅ PASS - state=deprioritize, interestLevel=No signals yet, trend=Cooling, signals=[no_engagement_14d]
verified_requirements.Creighton (N/A, no outreach) → no_signal: ✅ PASS - state=no_signals, interestLevel=Not started, trend=Stable, signals=[]
